markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the Q1 content strategy and the new website launch.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** A Q1 strategy will create \~100+ articles on tech tools (e.g., Sanity) to build SEO authority. These will be organized into "chapter" landing pages, with content creation starting immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [**Website Launch:** The new website launches today, requiring all content publishing to shift to the "next-gen studio" in Sanity by Monday. Jesse will record a Loom to guide the transition.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
  - [**Site Cleanup:** Webstacks will tag all articles and implement redirects from a blog audit to improve site cohesion and SEO. GrowthX will provide AI-assisted tag suggestions.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [**Contract Renewal:** The quarterly contract renews Jan 13. GrowthX will investigate if the current agreement is an annual term with quarterly billing, as Webstacks believes.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)

## Topics

### Q1 Content Strategy: Tool-Based Pillar Content

  - [**Goal:** Build SEO authority by creating \~100+ articles on tech tools (e.g., Sanity, Contentful).](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [**Structure:** Content will be organized into "chapter" landing pages for each tool.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [Each "chapter" (e.g., "What is Sanity?") will be a separate article.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [Topics will be prioritized by search volume and partner status.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
      - ["Alternatives" articles will capture audiences using non-partner tools.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [**Location:** Webstacks will build a simple card-deck template for the landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
          - [**Placement Options:** `/resources`, `/technologies`, or root-level slugs (e.g., `/sanity`).](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
          - [**Decision:** Jacob (GrowthX) will advise on the best SEO structure.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [**Workflow:** GrowthX will create a content calendar from the blog audit to identify missing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
          - [Eric (Webstacks) will use this calendar to gather developer insights during coffee chats, ensuring content quality and accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

### Website Launch & CMS Transition

  - [**Launch:** The new website launches today.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**CMS Transition:** All content publishing must shift to the new "next-gen studio" in Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
      - [The old studio will be decommissioned this afternoon.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=2199.0)
      - [Jesse will record a Loom to guide the transition.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Publishing Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
      - [**Today:** Publishing to the old studio is acceptable.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
      - [**Monday:** All publishing must occur in the new studio.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
  - [**New CMS Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Customizable CTAs:** Sidebar CTAs can now be customized per post (e.g., quote blocks, ebook panels) and saved as reusable templates.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
      - [**Redirects:** A simple tool allows for source/destination URL entry.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)

### Site Cleanup & Optimization

  - [**Blog Audit:** A review of the blog audit identified two cleanup tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [**Tagging:**](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
      - [**Problem:** Many articles have "null" tags, hurting site cohesion and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
      - [**Action:** Webstacks will tag all articles. GrowthX will provide AI-assisted tag suggestions for review.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [**Redirects:**](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [**Problem:** The audit lists old pages to be redirected or killed.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [**Action:** Webstacks will implement the redirects. GrowthX will confirm if pages without a specified destination should be killed.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [**Clarification:** The "Between the Brackets" series has already been moved to `/culture` with redirects in place, reducing the audit's redirect list.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)

### Contract Renewal

  - [**Status:** The quarterly contract renews on Jan 13.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
  - [**Goal:** GrowthX aims to convert all clients to annual contracts.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**Discrepancy:** Webstacks believes the current agreement is an annual term with quarterly billing, not a quarterly renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Both teams will investigate the contract details.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jesse:**](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=2077.0)
      - [Record and share Loom video on the new Sanity studio.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Invite GrowthX to the new Sanity studio.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
      - [Investigate contract terms regarding annual vs. quarterly renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [Share meeting links and action items in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [Consult Jacob on the best SEO structure for the new tool landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [Provide AI-assisted tag suggestions for Webstacks' review.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
      - [Confirm with Jacob if pages without a redirect destination should be killed.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [Investigate contract terms regarding annual vs. quarterly renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
      - [Publish any remaining articles to the old Sanity studio today.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
      - [Begin all new publishing in the "next-gen studio" on Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
  - [**Eric:**](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
      - [Use the content calendar to gather developer insights for new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [Collaborate with Jesse on tagging all articles.](https://fathom.video/share/9RNsrNrVHve73ms1d7tNjCqCdwfKR8zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
